SME_Preferential_Policy.policy_name: Tax Preferential Policy for Small and Micro Enterprises
SME_Preferential_Policy.policy_content: For annual taxable income not exceeding 1 million yuan, it is reduced to 25% for taxable income calculation and subject to corporate income tax at a rate of 20%
application_requirements: Number of employees not exceeding 300
Total assets not exceeding 50 million yuan
Annual taxable income not exceeding 3 million yuan

Tech_SME_RD_Deduction.policy_name: R&D Expense Super Deduction Policy for Technology-based SMEs
Tech_SME_RD_Deduction.policy_content: For R&D expenses actually incurred in R&D activities, if not forming intangible assets and recorded as current profit or loss, an additional 100% of the actual amount can be deducted before tax on the basis of prescribed deduction
application_requirements: Obtained Technology-based SME certification
Established R&D expense subsidiary account
Actually engaged in R&D activities

Entrepreneurship_Guarantee_Loan.policy_name: Entrepreneurship Guarantee Loan Interest Subsidy Policy
Entrepreneurship_Guarantee_Loan.applicable_to: Qualified individuals and small and micro enterprises
Entrepreneurship_Guarantee_Loan.policy_content: Individual loan limit up to 200,000 yuan, small and micro enterprise loan limit up to 3 million yuan, with interest subsidy provided by finance departments
application_requirements: Within legal working age with full civil capacity
Good personal credit record
Entrepreneurial intention and capability
Comply with national industrial policies
Entrepreneurship_Guarantee_Loan.consultation_phone: Local Human Resources and Social Security Department

High_Tech_Enterprise_Certification.policy_name: High-tech Enterprise Certification and Tax Preferential Treatment
High_Tech_Enterprise_Certification.policy_content: Certified as high-tech enterprise, subject to corporate income tax at a reduced rate of 15%
application_requirements: Enterprise must be registered for more than one year at the time of application

Enterprise has obtained ownership of intellectual property that plays a core supporting role in technology for its main products (services) through independent R&D, transfer, donation, acquisition, etc.
Technology that plays a core supporting role for the enterprise's main products (services) belongs to the scope specified in the 'National Key Supported High-tech Fields'
Scientific and technical personnel engaged in R&D and related technological innovation activities account for no less than 10% of the total number of employees in the current year
The ratio of total R&D expenses for the past three fiscal years to total sales revenue during the same period meets requirements
High-tech product (service) revenue in the most recent year accounts for no less than 60% of the enterprise's total revenue during the same period
Enterprise innovation capability evaluation should meet corresponding requirements
The enterprise has not experienced major safety accidents, major quality accidents, or serious environmental violations in the year prior to application
required_materials: Registration certificates proving legal establishment of the enterprise
High_Tech_Enterprise_Certification.policy_duration: High-tech enterprise certificate is valid for three years

Specialized_Little_Giant.policy_name: Specialized and Sophisticated 'Little Giant' Enterprise Cultivation Support Policy
Specialized_Little_Giant.policy_content: Central finance provides reward support funds to specialized and sophisticated 'Little Giant' enterprises at no more than 60% of the approved support standard
application_requirements: Engaged in specific niche market for more than 2 years
Operating revenue in the previous year exceeds 10 million yuan
Average growth rate of main business revenue or net profit in the past 2 years reaches more than 5%
Enterprise debt-to-asset ratio not higher than 70%
Compound annual growth rate of operating revenue in the past 2 years not less than 5% or compound annual growth rate of operating revenue in the past 2 years not less than 10%
required_materials: Specialized and Sophisticated 'Little Giant' Enterprise Application Form
Audit report for the previous year
Specialized_Little_Giant.consultation_phone: Local Industry and Information Technology Authority

SME_Development_Special_Fund.policy_name: SME Development Special Fund Support Policy
SME_Development_Special_Fund.policy_content: Support the construction of SME public service system and financing service system, guide social resources to serve SMEs
application_requirements: SME registered within the territory of the People's Republic of China
Has independent legal entity status
Sound financial management system
No adverse credit records
